Build Log · Programming / AI Agentic

Stockportfolio manager
Agentic workflow Project

I have made a few atempts to achive a failrly automated investing scheme for my savings. With two sucsessfull models of my discounted cashflow model earning a cumilative avarage of 50% over the last 2 years, it was about time I improved it with some agentic workflows.

With the current geopolitical unrest, it is important to consider all aspects of an investment. Time which I would rather spend on something else.

LLMS have proven grow smarter each moth at an exponential rate. Hence, it seemed like an fun experiement to let an LLM handle all decision making. This said, LLMs, as of now have a habit of halucinating, extrapolating from existing data to that what it does not at an unreasonable rate

However, with proper toolcalling and reasoning with context, I have found that the LLM can be a very useful tool for making investment decisions.

To start off I need to initialise a few safty nets. The agent/s is not allowed to invest on real stocks. Instead I will build a similated stock market. The Agent will then be allowed it exicute stock transitations within this sandbox while I monitor its performance.

Step 01

Material Selection

Timber was sourced from Nelsons Trelast. 48 × 48 pine was selected for its cost-effectiveness and suitable grain structure — straight, tight grain with good workability under hand and machine tools.

PropertyDetail
MaterialPine (softwood)
Stock dimensions48 mm × 48 mm
SupplierNelsons Trelast
Selection criteriaGrain structure, machinability, cost
